ref.title: Human: Skillful
body: You gain proficiency in one additional skill of your choice from any list.

grantsPool.label: Heroic Inspiration
grantsPool.reminder: Heroic Inspiration: reroll any d20 and keep either result.

ref.title: Human: Resourceful
body: You gain Heroic Inspiration whenever you finish a long rest, if you don't already have it. Spend it to reroll a d20.

ref.title: Human: Versatile
body: You gain one Origin feat of your choice, on top of the feat from your background.

ref.title: Darkvision & Dwarven Toughness
body: Darkvision out to 120 ft. Dwarven Toughness raises your hit point maximum by 1 per level.

ref.title: Dwarven Resilience
body: You have Resistance to poison damage and Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Poisoned condition.

ref.title: Stonecunning
body: As a Bonus Action, gain Tremorsense out to 60 ft for 10 minutes while you are in contact with stone or a stone surface.
Uses equal to your Proficiency Bonus, regained on a long rest.

ref.title: Halfling: Brave
body: You have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Frightened condition.

ref.title: Halfling: Luck
body: When you roll a 1 on the d20 of a D20 Test (an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw), you can reroll the die and must use the new roll.

ref.title: Halfling: Nimbleness
body: You can move through the space of any creature that is a size larger than you, though it isn't difficult terrain for you.
